name: Horizontal tail servo
notes: Placed at the horizontal stabilizer geometric center until a measured installation location is supplied.

name: Vertical tail servo
notes: Placed at the vertical stabilizer geometric center until a measured installation location is supplied.

name: Landing gear
notes: Installed directly below the main-wing leading edge, with its center 4 inches below the wing plane.

name: Fuselage structure
notes: Fuselage-local uniform linear-density approximation from the electronics front edge to the aft-most Mission-2 payload edge.

name: Battery
notes: Equivalent fat electronics-area CM, packed inside the fuselage before airplane installation.

name: Motor and propeller
notes: Equivalent fat electronics-area CM, packed inside the fuselage before airplane installation.

name: ESC
notes: Equivalent fat electronics-area CM, packed inside the fuselage before airplane installation.

name: Other electronics
notes: Equivalent fat electronics-area CM, packed inside the fuselage before airplane installation.

name: Duck 1
notes: Fuselage-local front-to-back placement; row 0, column 0; first column is against the negative-y fuselage sidewall.

name: Duck 2
notes: Fuselage-local front-to-back placement; row 1, column 0; first column is against the negative-y fuselage sidewall.

name: Duck 3
notes: Fuselage-local front-to-back placement; row 2, column 0; first column is against the negative-y fuselage sidewall.
